creator: dnaeon@gmail.com
text:
On Sun, Apr 15, 2012 at 3:33 PM, takanori sawada <tak.swd@gmail.com> wrote:
> I was able to install version 2.2.2.1 using this patch.
> Thank you Marin san.
>
> Did you have any problem?


Hi takanori,

Generally there are no problems (probably not yet :)), and the port
should install and work fine.

BTW, currently the latest version of the port can be found in the
Github repo for Gerrit [1], which installs 2.3 of Gerrit.

There are a few things that should be checked upfront before this goes
to the Tree, like for example to drop the "gerrit" user if possible
(see ports/163666), but I haven't had much time recently to work on
this.

Regards,
Marin

[1]: https://github.com/dnaeon/gerrit-freebsd

> --
> takanori sawada



--
